{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4842195278606858022
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom httpx import AsyncClient\r\n\r\nfrom miniqueue.api_app import create_app\r\nfrom miniqueue.db import init_db\r\nfrom miniqueue.models import JobState\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED\r\nasync def test_post_jobs_idempotency(tmp_path, monkeypatch) -> None:\r\n    # Use a file-based SQLite DB for this test.\r\n    db_path = tmp_path / \"jobs.db\"\r\n    monkeypatch.setenv(\"MINIQUEUE_DB_URL\", f\"sqlite+aiosqlite:///{db_path}\")\r\n\r\n    app = create_app()\r\n    await init_db()\r\n\r\n    async with AsyncClient(app=app, base_url=\"http://test\") as client:\r\n        body = {\r\n            \"type\": \"sleep\",\r\n            \"payload\": {\"seconds\": 1.0},\r\n            \"idempotency_key\": \"idem-1\",\r\n        }\r\n        r1 = await client.post(\"/jobs\", json=body)\r\n        assert r1.status_code == 201\r\n        job_id_1 = r1.json()[\"job_id\"]\r\n\r\n        r2 = await client.post(\"/jobs\", json=body)\r\n        assert r2.status_code == 201\r\n        job_id_2 = r2.json()[\"job_id\"]\r\n\r\n        assert job_id_1 == job_id_2\r\n\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "f59ef199bddc6887944144668cf4c01fa969843177a438b7cfdf3239579c1628",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom miniqueue.backoff import compute_backoff_seconds\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_backoff_increases_and_is_capped() -> None:\r\n    base = 1.0\r\n    mult = 2.0\r\n    cap = 10.0\r\n\r\n    # Deterministic RNG that always returns 1.0 (upper bound)\r\n    rng = lambda: 1.0\r\n\r\n    d1 = compute_backoff_seconds(1, base=base, multiplier=mult, cap=cap, rng=rng)\r\n    d2 = compute_backoff_seconds(2, base=base, multiplier=mult, cap=cap, rng=rng)\r\n    d3 = compute_backoff_seconds(3, base=base, multiplier=mult, cap=cap, rng=rng)\r\n    d5 = compute_backoff_seconds(5, base=base, multiplier=mult, cap=cap, rng=rng)\r\n\r\n    assert d1 == base\r\n    assert d2 == base * mult\r\n    assert d3 == base * mult**2\r\n    assert d5 == cap\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_backoff_uses_jitter_bounds() -> None:\r\n    base = 1.0\r\n    mult = 2.0\r\n    cap = 10.0\r\n\r\n    low_rng = lambda: 0.0\r\n    high_rng = lambda: 1.0\r\n\r\n    low = compute_backoff_seconds(3, base=base, multiplier=mult, cap=cap, rng=low_rng)\r\n    high = compute_backoff_seconds(3, base=base, multiplier=mult, cap=cap, rng=high_rng)\r\n\r\n    assert low == 0.0\r\n    assert high == min(cap, base * mult**2)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef test_backoff_rejects_non_positive_attempt() -> None:\r\n    try:\r\n        compute_backoff_seconds(0, base=1.0, multiplier=2.0, cap=10.0)\r\n    except ValueError:\r\n        pass\r\n    else:\r\n        assert False, \"Expected ValueError for non-positive attempt\"\r\n\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "5346d93bd73a62dca567c47007c8cca84aa55bc15486810b7919988f08f18628",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport asyncio\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession, create_async_engine\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker\r\n\r\nfrom miniqueue.models import Base, Job, JobState\r\nfrom miniqueue.state_machine import InvalidStateTransition, transition_state\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED\r\nasync def test_valid_transitions_create_events(tmp_path) -> None:\r\n    engine = create_async_engine(\"sqlite+aiosqlite:///:memory:\", future=True)\r\n    async with engine.begin() as conn:\r\n        await conn.run_sync(Base.metadata.create_all)\r\n\r\n    async_session = sessionmaker(engine, expire_on_commit=False, class_=AsyncSession)\r\n\r\n    async with async_session() as session:\r\n        async with session.begin():\r\n            job = Job(type=\"sleep\", queue=\"default\", payload={\"seconds\": 1.0})\r\n            session.add(job)\r\n\r\n        async with session.begin():\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.RUNNING, \"start\")\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.SUCCEEDED, \"done\")\r\n\r\n        # Reload and check events count and final state.\r\n        async with session.begin():\r\n            db_job = await session.get(Job, job.id)\r\n            assert db_job is not None\r\n            assert db_job.state == JobState.SUCCEEDED\r\n            assert len(db_job.events) == 2\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED\r\nasync def test_invalid_transition_rejected(tmp_path) -> None:\r\n    engine = create_async_engine(\"sqlite+aiosqlite:///:memory:\", future=True)\r\n    async with engine.begin() as conn:\r\n        await conn.run_sync(Base.metadata.create_all)\r\n\r\n    async_session = sessionmaker(engine, expire_on_commit=False, class_=AsyncSession)\r\n\r\n    async with async_session() as session:\r\n        async with session.begin():\r\n            job = Job(type=\"sleep\", queue=\"default\", payload={\"seconds\": 1.0})\r\n            job.state = JobState.SUCCEEDED\r\n            session.add(job)\r\n\r\n        async with session.begin():\r\n            with pytest.raises(InvalidStateTransition):\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.RUNNING, \"should fail\")\r\n\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "27242f53ecea75d672c24ef747cb876c6cdec85dc95b5b521b57a9566d199352",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport asyncio\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\r\n\r\nimport pytest\r\nfrom httpx import AsyncClient\r\n\r\nfrom miniqueue.api_app import create_app\r\nfrom miniqueue.config import get_settings\r\nfrom miniqueue.db import init_db\r\nfrom miniqueue.models import Job, JobState\r\nfrom miniqueue.scheduler import scheduler_loop, load_schedules\r\nfrom miniqueue.worker import ensure_group, worker_loop\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED\r\nasync def test_delayed_job_not_before_run_at_and_scheduler_restart(tmp_path, monkeypatch) -> None:\r\n    # Configure DB and Redis URL for local dockerized Redis.\r\n    db_path = tmp_path / \"jobs.db\"\r\n    monkeypatch.setenv(\"MINIQUEUE_DB_URL\", f\"sqlite+aiosqlite:///{db_path}\")\r\n    monkeypatch.setenv(\"MINIQUEUE_REDIS_URL\", \"redis://localhost:6379/0\")\r\n    monkeypatch.setenv(\"MINIQUEUE_SCHEDULER_INTERVAL_SEC\", \"1\")\r\n\r\n    app = create_app()\r\n    await init_db()\r\n    settings = get_settings()\r\n    await ensure_group(settings.queue_default)\r\n\r\n    # Start a single worker and a scheduler loop.\r\n    stop_event = asyncio.Event()\r\n\r\n    async def worker_task() -> None:\r\n        await worker_loop(0, queue=settings.queue_default, consumer_name=\"test-worker\")\r\n\r\n    from miniqueue.scheduler import load_schedules\r\n\r\n    # Use an empty schedule list so only delayed jobs are processed.\r\n    schedules = []\r\n\r\n    async def scheduler_task() -> None:\r\n        await scheduler_loop(schedules)\r\n\r\n    wt = asyncio.create_task(worker_task())\r\n    st = asyncio.create_task(scheduler_task())\r\n\r\n    async with AsyncClient(app=app, base_url=\"http://test\") as client:\r\n        run_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(seconds=3)\r\n        body = {\r\n            \"type\": \"sleep\",\r\n            \"payload\": {\"seconds\": 0.1},\r\n            \"run_at\": run_at.isoformat(),\r\n        }\r\n        resp = await client.post(\"/jobs\", json=body)\r\n        assert resp.status_code == 201\r\n        job_id = resp.json()[\"job_id\"]\r\n\r\n        # Ensure job does not complete before run_at.\r\n        pre_deadline = run_at - timedelta(seconds=1)\r\n        while datetime.now(timezone.utc) < pre_deadline:\r\n            r = await client.get(f\"/jobs/{job_id}\")\r\n            data = r.json()\r\n            assert data[\"state\"] in {\"QUEUED\", \"RUNNING\"}\r\n            await asyncio.sleep(0.5)\r\n\r\n        # Wait until after run_at and ensure completion.\r\n        deadline = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(seconds=10)\r\n        while datetime.now(timezone.utc) < deadline:\r\n            r = await client.get(f\"/jobs/{job_id}\")\r\n            data = r.json()\r\n            if data[\"state\"] == \"SUCCEEDED\":\r\n                break\r\n            await asyncio.sleep(0.5)\r\n        else:\r\n            pytest.fail(\"Job did not complete after run_at\")\r\n\r\n    # Cleanup tasks.\r\n    wt.cancel()\r\n    st.cancel()\r\n    await asyncio.gather(wt, st, return_exceptions=True)\r\n\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "153a718bd8cb605bafe68ec6d1a543a0bcd7495b909528c7365761d687092afd",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}

http:requestBodyJSON is %257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253AI64%2522%253A4842195278606858022%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25226%253AVARINT%2522%253A4%252C%25227%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%255C%255CAer_J1EHDqJlae-H4TQ%255C%255CUzzcwJJCYurW-g%255C%255Cf5_Ntn9-lBp70-IXbZGMIzFMhFlhIQ.MO9Sj9b9qRD9MQ%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522from%2B__future__%2Bimport%2Bannotations%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cnimport%2Bpytest%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bhttpx%2Bimport%2BAsyncClient%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bminiqueue.api_app%2Bimport%2Bcreate_app%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bminiqueue.db%2Bimport%2Binit_db%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bminiqueue.models%2Bimport%2BJobState%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255CREDACTED%255Cr%255Cnasync%2Bdef%2Btest_post_jobs_idempotency%2528tmp_path%252C%2Bmonkeypatch%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BUse%2Ba%2Bfile-based%2BSQLite%2BDB%2Bfor%2Bthis%2Btest.%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bdb_path%2B%3D%2Btmp_path%2B%252F%2B%255C%2522jobs.db%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bmonkeypatch.setenv%2528%255C%2522MINIQUEUE_DB_URL%255C%2522%252C%2Bf%255C%2522sqlite%2Baiosqlite%253A%252F%252F%252F%257Bdb_path%257D%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bapp%2B%253D%2Bcreate_app%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Binit_db%2528%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bwith%2BAsyncClient%2528app%253Dapp%252C%2Bbase_url%253D%255C%2522http%253A%252F%252Ftest%255C%2522%2529%2Bas%2Bclient%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bbody%2B%253D%2B%257B%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522type%255C%2522%253A%2B%255C%2522sleep%255C%2522%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522payload%255C%2522%253A%2B%257B%255C%2522seconds%255C%2522%253A%2B1.0%257D%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%255C%2522idempotency_key%255C%2522%253A%2B%255C%2522idem-1%255C%2522%252C%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%257D%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Br1%2B%253D%2Bawait%2Bclient.post%2528%255C%2522%252Fjobs%255C%2522%252C%2Bjson%253Dbody%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Br1.status_code%2B%253D%253D%2B201%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bjob_id_1%2B%253D%2Br1.json%2528%2529%255B%255C%2522job_id%255C%2522%255D%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Br2%2B%253D%2Bawait%2Bclient.post%2528%255C%2522%252Fjobs%255C%2522%252C%2Bjson%253Dbody%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Br2.status_code%2B%253D%253D%2B201%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bjob_id_2%2B%253D%2Br2.json%2528%2529%255B%255C%2522job_id%255C%2522%255D%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bjob_id_1%2B%253D%253D%2Bjob_id_2%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522f59ef199bddc6887944144668cf4c01fa969843177a438b7cfdf3239579c1628%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%252C%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522from%2B__future__%2Bimport%2Bannotations%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bminiqueue.backoff%2Bimport%2Bcompute_backoff_seconds%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cndef%2Btest_backoff_increases_and_is_capped%2528%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bbase%2B%253D%2B1.0%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bmult%2B%253D%2B2.0%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bcap%2B%253D%2B10.0%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2523%2BDeterministic%2BRNG%2Bthat%2Balways%2Breturns%2B1.0%2B%2528upper%2Bbound%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Brng%2B%253D%2Blambda%253A%2B1.0%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bd1%2B%253D%2Bcompute_backoff_seconds%25281%252C%2Bbase%253Dbase%252C%2Bmultiplier%253Dmult%252C%2Bcap%253Dcap%252C%2Brng%253Drng%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bd2%2B%253D%2Bcompute_backoff_seconds%25282%252C%2Bbase%253Dbase%252C%2Bmultiplier%253Dmult%252C%2Bcap%253Dcap%252C%2Brng%253Drng%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bd3%2B%253D%2Bcompute_backoff_seconds%25283%252C%2Bbase%253Dbase%252C%2Bmultiplier%253Dmult%252C%2Bcap%253Dcap%252C%2Brng%253Drng%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bd5%2B%253D%2Bcompute_backoff_seconds%25285%252C%2Bbase%253Dbase%252C%2Bmultiplier%253Dmult%252C%2Bcap%253Dcap%252C%2Brng%253Drng%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bd1%2B%253D%253D%2Bbase%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bd2%2B%253D%253D%2Bbase%2B%252A%2Bmult%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bd3%2B%253D%253D%2Bbase%2B%252A%2Bmult%252A%252A2%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bd5%2B%253D%253D%2Bcap%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cndef%2Btest_backoff_uses_jitter_bounds%2528%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bbase%2B%253D%2B1.0%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bmult%2B%253D%2B2.0%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bcap%2B%253D%2B10.0%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Blow_rng%2B%253D%2Blambda%253A%2B0.0%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bhigh_rng%2B%253D%2Blambda%253A%2B1.0%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Blow%2B%253D%2Bcompute_backoff_seconds%25283%252C%2Bbase%253Dbase%252C%2Bmultiplier%253Dmult%252C%2Bcap%253Dcap%252C%2Brng%253Dlow_rng%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bhigh%2B%253D%2Bcompute_backoff_seconds%25283%252C%2Bbase%253Dbase%252C%2Bmultiplier%253Dmult%252C%2Bcap%253Dcap%252C%2Brng%253Dhigh_rng%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Blow%2B%253D%253D%2B0.0%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2Bhigh%2B%253D%253D%2Bmin%2528cap%252C%2Bbase%2B%252A%2Bmult%252A%252A2%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cndef%2Btest_backoff_rejects_non_positive_attempt%2528%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Btry%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bcompute_backoff_seconds%25280%252C%2Bbase%253D1.0%252C%2Bmultiplier%253D2.0%252C%2Bcap%253D10.0%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bexcept%2BValueError%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bpass%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Belse%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bassert%2BFalse%252C%2B%255C%2522Expected%2BValueError%2Bfor%2Bnon-positive%2Battempt%255C%2522%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%25225346d93bd73a62dca567c47007c8cca84aa55bc15486810b7919988f08f18628%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%252C%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522from%2B__future__%2Bimport%2Bannotations%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cnimport%2Basyncio%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cnimport%2Bpytest%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bsqlalchemy.ext.asyncio%2Bimport%2BAsyncSession%252C%2Bcreate_async_engine%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bsqlalchemy.orm%2Bimport%2Bsessionmaker%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bminiqueue.models%2Bimport%2BBase%252C%2BJob%252C%2BJobState%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bminiqueue.state_machine%2Bimport%2BInvalidStateTransition%252C%2Btransition_state%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255CREDACTED%255Cr%255Cnasync%2Bdef%2Btest_valid_transitions_create_events%2528tmp_path%2529%2B-%255Cu003e%2BNone%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Bengine%2B%253D%2Bcreate_async_engine%2528%255C%2522sqlite%2Baiosqlite%253A%252F%252F%252F%253Amemory%253A%255C%2522%252C%2Bfuture%253DTrue%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bwith%2Bengine.begin%2528%2529%2Bas%2Bconn%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Bconn.run_sync%2528Base.metadata.create_all%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basync_session%2B%253D%2Bsessionmaker%2528engine%252C%2Bexpire_on_commit%253DFalse%252C%2Bclass_%253DAsyncSession%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bwith%2Basync_session%2528%2529%2Bas%2Bsession%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bwith%2Bsession.begin%2528%2529%253A%255Cr% ession%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bwith%2Bsession.begin%2528%2529%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bjob%2B%253D%2BJob%2528type%253D%255C%2522sleep%255C%2522%252C%2Bqueue%253D%255C%2522default%255C%2522%252C%2Bpayload%253D%257B%255C%2522seconds%255C%2522%253A%2B1.0%257D%2529%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bjob.state%2B%253D%2BJobState.SUCCEEDED%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bsession.add%2528job%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Basync%2Bwith%2Bsession.begin%2528%2529%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bwith%2Bpytest.raises%2528InvalidStateTransition%2529%253A%255Cr%255Cn%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2B%2Bawait%2Btransition_state%2528session%252C%2Bjob%252C%2BJobState.RUNNING%252C%2B%255C%2522should%2Bfail%255C%2522%2529%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cn%2522%257D%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%252227242f53ecea75d672c24ef747cb876c6cdec85dc95b5b521b57a9566d199352%2522%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%25223%253ALEN%2522%253A%255B%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%257D%252C%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522.%2522%257D%255D%252C%25224%253AVARINT%2522%253A1%257D%252C%257B%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%257B%25221%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522REDACTED%2522%252C%25222%253ALEN%2522%253A%2522from%2B__future__%2Bimport%2Bannotations%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cnimport%2Basyncio%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bdatetime%2Bimport%2Bdatetime%252C%2Btimedelta%252C%2Btimezone%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cnimport%2Bpytest%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bhttpx%2Bimport%2BAsyncClient%255Cr%255Cn%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bminiqueue.api_app%2Bimport%2Bcreate_app%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bminiqueue.config%2Bimport%2Bget_settings%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bminiqueue.db%2Bimport%2Binit_db%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bminiqueue.models%2Bimport%2BJob%252C%2BJobState%255Cr%255Cnfrom%2Bminiqueue.scheduler%2Bimport%2Bscheduler_loop%252C%2Bload_schedules%255Cr%255C
